servinfo.title: ESP® Hydraulic Unit / Control Module Assembly Removal and Installation

ptxt.intxrefpoff: ESP® Hydraulic Unit / Control Module Assembly Components
ESP® Hydraulic Unit / Control Module Assembly On-Vehicle Inspection

item.ptxt: Be careful not to allow dust to enter ESP® hydraulic unit / control module assembly.
Do not place ESP® hydraulic unit / control module assembly on its side or turn it upside down. Handling it in inappropriate way will spoil its original performance.

Never disassemble ESP® hydraulic unit / control module assembly, loosen blind plug or remove motor. Failure to observe this precaution will spoil original performance of ESP® hydraulic unit / control module assembly.
Do not allow brake fluid to get on painted surfaces. Painted surfaces will be damaged by brake fluid. Flush pointed surface with water immediately if any fluid is spilled.
Be sure to tighten every fastener to specified torque using torque wrench to avoid damage.
Do not give an impact to hydraulic unit.

s1.ptxt: Disconnect ESP® hydraulic unit / control module assembly connector (1) by pulling up the lock lever (2).
Loosen flare nuts (1) using special tool and disconnect brake pipes (2) from ESP® hydraulic unit / control module assembly (3).

attention3.ptxt: Put bleeder plug cap or the like onto pipe to prevent fluid from spilling.

s1.ptxt: Remove or loosen ESP® hydraulic unit / control module assembly nuts (1) and remove ESP® hydraulic unit / control module assembly (3) from actuator bracket (2).

attention2.ptxt: Be careful not to damage bushing (5).

attention3.ptxt: If ESP® hydraulic unit / control module assembly nuts are not removed, loosen each nut to the end of screw (4) as shown in figure.

servinfosub.title: Installation
servinfosub.ptxt: Reverse removal procedures noting the following points.

item.ptxt: Tighten brake pipe flare nuts using special tool to specified torques. Also tighten ESP® hydraulic unit / control module assembly nuts to specified torque.

torqueitem.t-part: ESP® hydraulic unit / control module assembly nut

attention2.ptxt: Be careful not to deform or scratch bushing (1) when installing ESP® hydraulic unit / control module assembly.

item.ptxt: Bleed air out of brake system. (Brake fluid replacement)
Check for leakage of brake fluid and perform ESP® hydraulic unit operation check. (ESP® Hydraulic Unit Operation Check)
